channel.title: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence
channel.description: The most comprehensive, curated collection of resources on Artificial General Intelligence (AGI), Artificial Superintelligence (ASI), and Collective Intelligence -- updated April 2026. Covers GPT 5.4, Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, Claude Opus 4.6, frontier models, JEPA architectures, AI agents, multi-agent systems, LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, safety, alignment, research papers, development tools, and emerging security threats for builders and researchers shaping the future of intelligence.

image.title: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Announcement
item.description: Announcement
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence
Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Home
item.description: The most comprehensive curated collection of AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence resources updated April 2026 -- frameworks, agents, multi-agent systems, GPT 5.4, Gemini 3.1 Flash Live, Claude Opus 4.6, JEPA models, frontier AI, LLMs, RAG, fine-tuning, safety, alignment, research papers, development tools, and emerging security threats for AI builders.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Papers, Blogs, Courses and Lectures
item.description: The research frontier -- cutting-edge papers on capabilities, reasoning, agents, alignment, and interpretability defining the path from LLMs to AGI.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Collective Intelligence
item.description: Understanding Collective Intelligence -- multi-agent systems, swarm intelligence, human-AI collaboration, distributed AI, and emergent intelligence beyond individual agents.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Contributing
item.description: Comprehensive guidelines for contributing resources to the Awesome AGI and ASI repository, including formatting standards, submission process, and community curation guidelines.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Agents
item.description: Autonomous AI systems that perceive, reason, and act in the world. These agents represent the closest things we have to AGI-like behavior in narrow domains -- writing code, conducting research, operating computers, and navigating virtual worlds.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Frameworks and Platforms
item.description: The infrastructure powering the next generation of autonomous AI. These frameworks let you build, orchestrate, and deploy AI agents that can reason, browse, code, and collaborate -- from single-agent tools to multi-agent orchestration platforms.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Paper-to-Code Automation
item.description: The leap from research paper to working implementation is one of the biggest bottlenecks in AI progress. These tools automate the translation of academic papers into production-ready code repositories -- accelerating the research-to-engineering pipeline and democratizing access to frontier techniques.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Physical AI & Embodied Intelligence
item.description: AGI cannot exist only in text -- it must understand and act in the physical world. **Physical AI** bridges foundation models with embodiment: humanoid robots, manipulation, navigation, and physics simulation. Moravec's Paradox -- sensorimotor skills are harder than abstract reasoning -- remains one of the deepest unsolved AGI challenges.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Data Infrastructure for AI at Scale
item.description: AGI systems are fundamentally bound by their data layers. Training frontier models requires petabyte-scale data pipelines, and deploying them requires infrastructure that can serve millions of requests with sub-second latency. The SRE and data engineering challenges behind superintelligence are as hard as the ML itself.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: LLM Deployment and Serving
item.description: Getting models from research to production. High-performance inference engines, serving frameworks, and optimization tools that make LLMs fast, cost-efficient, and scalable.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Distributed Training Frameworks
item.description: Training frontier models requires distributing computation across thousands of GPUs. These frameworks handle the parallelism, memory optimization, and communication needed to train models with billions (or trillions) of parameters.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: LLM Fine-Tuning Techniques
item.description: Making foundation models your own. Fine-tuning adapts pre-trained LLMs to specific tasks, domains, or behaviors -- from lightweight LoRA adapters that train in hours on a single GPU to full alignment techniques like DPO that shape model values.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: LLM Application Frameworks
item.description: The developer toolkits for building production LLM applications. From orchestration chains to observability platforms, these frameworks are the backbone of every AI product shipping today.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Prompt Engineering
item.description: The art and science of communicating with LLMs. These techniques transform how models reason, from simple chain-of-thought to sophisticated graph-structured exploration of solution spaces.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: RAG and Vector Databases
item.description: RAG grounds LLMs in real-world data, eliminating hallucinations and enabling knowledge-intensive applications. Full RAG stack: vector storage, retrieval engines, graph RAG, document parsing, and embedding models.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Top Conferences
item.description: Where the AGI community gathers. From peer-reviewed academic venues publishing foundational research to government-level safety summits and industry developer conferences shaping the future of AI.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Tutorials and Guides
item.description: Hands-on learning resources to go from understanding AI concepts to building production systems. Courses, documentation, and curated collections for every skill level.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Safety, Alignment and Governance
item.description: The most critical section. Ensuring AI remains safe, aligned with human values, and under meaningful control is the defining challenge as systems grow more capable.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: ASI and Superintelligence Research
item.description: The long game. This section tracks the organizations racing toward AGI/ASI, the books that frame the debate, the seminal papers that define the field, the benchmarks that measure progress, and the roadmaps that predict when -- and how -- we get there.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Compute, Hardware & Quantization
item.description: AI compute infrastructure, custom silicon, quantization tools, neuromorphic chips, and decentralized compute networks powering the path to AGI and ASI.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: AGI Benchmarks & Evals
item.description: Post-Turing AGI benchmarks and evaluation frameworks tracking the path from narrow AI to general intelligence -- ARC-AGI, SWE-bench, GAIA, GPQA, and more.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: DevOps Guide
item.description: Developer and DevOps guide for the Awesome AGI and ASI site -- GitHub Actions CI/CD, MkDocs Material configuration, SEO setup, and local development.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Blog
item.description: Updates, deep dives, and commentary on the journey from AI to AGI to ASI -- the Awesome AGI and ASI blog.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Understanding AI, AGI, and ASI
item.description: Learn the differences between Artificial Intelligence, Artificial General Intelligence, and Superintelligence -- capabilities, comparison table, DeepMind AGI levels, and future implications.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence

item.title: Welcome to Awesome AGI and ASI
item.description:
Welcome to Awesome AGI and ASI

The most comprehensive, curated collection of resources on the journey from AI to AGI to ASI is now available as a website with full-text search, clean navigation, and a minimal reading experience.
item.source: Awesome AGI, ASI, and Collective Intelligence
